svg.aria-label: SM_120 6-stage instruction pipeline — Fetch / Decode / Schedule / Operand Collect / Execute / Writeback

g.text: 128-bit fixed-width encoding · CGGTY scheduler · operand collector · 6 execution backends
Fetch 0 + Decode 1 + Schedule 1 + OpCol 0 (bypass) + Execute [2..64] + Writeback 1 = 5 .. 67 cyc
stall counter (4-bit, fixed-lat) ‖ 6 SB counters (HW, variable-lat)
